rationale.D1: Confirmed a genuine library-grade abstraction: generic `MotorIO` interface with `@AutoLog` inputs struct is reused across all mechanisms via `ServoMotorSubsystem` and `RollerMotorSubsystem` parameterized bases, plus device-specific `MotorIOTalonFX` and sim `SimMotorIOTalonFX` implementations; `VisionIO`/`SwerveIO` each have Real+Sim pairs; the abstraction is genuinely reused, not repeated.
rationale.D2: Confirmed a real coordinator: `SuperStructure` holds `WantedState`/`CurrentState` enums, `handleStateTransitions()` switches state, and `applyStates()` fans robot-wide goals with guarded shot-condition and rotation-tolerance checks out to all subsystems; each mechanism (Hopper, Intake, Shooter) also has its own local WantedState/SystemState FSM.
rationale.D3: Confirmed maple-sim drivetrain physics via `MapleSimSwerveDrivetrain` / `org.ironmaple.simulation` wired into `SwerveIOSim`; mechanism motors use `SimMotorIOTalonFX`; `SimulatedRobotState` manages the maple-sim arena; discounted: no vision sim variant exists (`VisionIOLimelight` is used even in sim).
rationale.D4: No `src/test` content whatsoever; CI runs `./gradlew build` (which would execute tests if they existed) and a `spotlessCheck` job, but there are zero test files — confirmed by filesystem search returning 0 java files under src/test.
rationale.D5: Confirmed `LoggedRobot` + `WPILOGWriter` + `NT4Publisher` in Robot.java; `@AutoLog` on `MotorIOInputs`, `VisionIOInputs`, `SwerveIO.SwerveIOInputs`, `RangeIOInputs`; `Logger.processInputs` called in every base subsystem class (ServoMotorSubsystem, RollerMotorSubsystem, VisionSubsystem, SwerveSubsystem, HopperSubsystem) covering all mechanisms.
rationale.D6: Confirmed 31 `.path` files in `src/main/deploy/pathplanner/paths/` and PathPlannerLib used for trajectory following in SwerveSubsystem; multiple competition autos defined (LEFT_NEUTRAL_ZONE, RIGHT_NEUTRAL_ZONE, DEPOT, LEFT_NEUTRAL_ZONE_TO_DEPOT); discounted D6=3 because no Choreo files and no on-the-fly pathfinding to poses — trajectories are pre-authored only.
rationale.D7: Confirmed `VisionIO` interface with `VisionIOLimelight` impl computing tag-based pose estimates sent to `RobotState.addVisionObservation()`; `SuperStructure` uses vision observations to perform a one-shot translation reset; discounted to 2.5 (not 3) because there is no `SwerveDrivePoseEstimator`/`addVisionMeasurement`, no std-dev filtering, no rejection logic, no `TimeInterpolatableBuffer`, and no vision sim variant.
rationale.D8: Confirmed real README with build/deploy instructions and code org docs; spotless linter configured in `build.gradle` and enforced by a dedicated CI `spotlessCheck` job; CI also runs `./gradlew build` on push/PR to `main`; discounted from 3 because there is no separate maintained team library repo carried across seasons.
